text.title: recognition-over-recall Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for recognition-over-recall as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding too many recognition aids (labels, tooltips, recent items, suggestions) simultaneously creates visual clutter
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Recognition support has diminishing returns. Balance recognition with aesthetic simplicity and scannability.

failure-mode.description: Autocomplete systems surfacing wrong suggestions erode trust faster than blank fields
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Poor suggestions are worse than no suggestions. Test autocomplete logic with real user data.

failure-mode.description: Recent items panels can expose sensitive data to shared-device users
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Consider privacy implications; offer session-scoped history rather than persistent history on shared devices.

failure-mode.description: Recognition aids add implementation complexity (state management for recents, fuzzy matching for search)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Teams often deprioritize these under time pressure. Plan complexity budget for recognition features upfront.

failure-mode.description: Static checklist audits miss dynamic state transitions where recognition fails
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A multi-step wizard with no summary panel is harder to audit than visible UI. Test with real user flows and state transitions.

failure-mode.description: Agents auditing UI from text descriptions will miss visual recognition failures
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Two similar icons adjacent to each other look the same; text descriptions cannot capture this. Provide annotated screenshots or component names with their icon descriptions.

failure-mode.description: Agents implementing "recent items" tend to use localStorage without considering session isolation or PII implications
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Specify storage scope explicitly (session-scoped, no PII) in the implementation prompt.

failure-mode.description: Autocomplete suggestions generated by agents may not account for the latency cost
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Specify debounce timing (typically 150-300ms) in the implementation prompt.

failure-mode.description: Recognition audit severity ratings by agents default to "Medium" for everything
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require explicit criteria: High = task cannot be completed without recall, Medium = slows task, Low = friction only.

failure-mode.description: Agents can identify technical violations but not judge visual design balance
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Human checkpoint required for visual design decisions — whether added labels harm the aesthetic balance of the layout.
